title: Resolution Extending Deepest Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Sangguniang Barangay Member of Barangay Bagong Silang Honorable Ma. Paz T. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Arlene P. Delos Santos, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 8/01/2022)
